## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, improves code quality)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security improvement

## Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested this change on multiple environments (development, staging)
- [ ] I have verified this change works on all supported browsers

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works

### Security

- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have not introduced any hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] My changes do not expose sensitive information

### Performance

- [ ] I have tested the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any memory leaks
- [ ] My changes do not significantly increase bundle size (frontend)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any N+1 queries (backend)

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README if necessary
- [ ] I have updated the API documentation if applicable
- [ ] I have added inline code comments for complex logic
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md with my changes

## Environment

- [ ] This change works on testnet
- [ ] This change works on mainnet (if applicable)
- [ ] This change is backwards compatible

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## Screenshots / Videos

If this is a UI change, please include screenshots or a short video demonstrating the changes.

### Before
[Attach screenshots of the current behavior]

### After
[Attach screenshots of the new behavior]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For example:

- Why this approach was chosen over alternatives
- Any trade-offs that were made
- Potential future improvements
- Dependencies that were added or removed

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] Database migration required
- [ ] Environment variables need to be updated
- [ ] Cache needs to be cleared
- [ ] Services need to be restarted

## Review Focus Areas

Please pay special attention to:

### Smart Contract Changes
- [ ] Gas optimization
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Upgrade compatibility
- [ ] Event emission

### Backend Changes
- [ ] API backwards compatibility
- [ ] Database performance
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] Rate limiting

### Frontend Changes
- [ ] Responsive design
- [ ] Accessibility (a11y)
- [ ] Browser compatibility
- [ ] Performance impact

Please provide clear steps for reviewers to test your changes:

2.

## Rollback Plan

If this change causes issues in production:

- [ ] Can be safely rolled back
- [ ] Database rollback script included
- [ ] Configuration rollback documented

---

Thank you for your contribution! 🎲
